info.title: PSGC API
info.description: API for Philippine Standard Geographic Code (PSGC) data. Based on the latest PSGC data available as of 2026.

requestBody.description: User object that needs to be created

post.description: Authenticates a user and returns an access token

requestBody.description: User object that needs to be created

get.description: Returns information about the authenticated user

post.description: Logs out the authenticated user and revokes their token

Retrieve a specific PSGC record by its code
Retrieve all distinct geographic levels
Retrieve all distinct city classifications
Retrieve all distinct income classifications
Retrieve all distinct urban/rural classifications

Retrieve all provinces in a specific region

Retrieve all barangays in a specific region

Retrieve all barangays in a specific city or municipality using PSGC code

Retrieve all cities with pagination
